title: hieracium brevifolium subsp. pachycorium
intro: Hieracium brevifolium subsp. pachycorium, also known as hawkweed or Hieracium pachycorium, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating fever and inflammation due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Hieracium brevifolium subsp. pachycorium include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic, making it useful in treating various conditions such as arthritis, skin infections, and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity and side effects.
